name: household-open-task
summary: Complete open-ended household goals with public map, observation, target-query, and episode tools.

mcp.boundary_notes: Public household open-task surface. Manipulation is optional and task-triggered; private generated mess truth, destination tables, and scorer artifacts are excluded.

capability_requirements.notes: Default surface=household-world open tasks require world evidence plus task lifecycle. Cleanup preset composes the separate manipulation-heavy cleanup skill.

refactor_signals: several open household goals share the same search or inspection routine
a repeated manipulation subgoal needs its own preset or subskill
promote_to_mcp_when: multiple skills need the same stable public capability
inputs and outputs are stable for the household world profile
private evaluation data is not needed
trace artifacts preserve the robot substeps
